name: UpdateWebhook
description: Update an existing webhook. You can change the URL, name, or event types that the webhook subscribes to.

url.description: The URL Mollie will send the events to. This URL must be publicly accessible. Leave empty to keep the existing URL.

name.description: A descriptive name that identifies the webhook. Leave empty to keep the existing name.

event_types.description: Event types to enable. Can be a list of specific events or '*' for all events. Leave empty to keep the existing event types.

testmode.description: Enable test mode operation. Leave empty to keep the existing mode setting.
